titles.en: On One who Takes A Female Slave and Doesn’t Have Sexual Intercourse with Her Once Every Forty Days as a Result of which She Commits A Forbidden Act
On One who Takes A Female Slave and Doesn’t Have Sexual Intercourse with Her Once Every Forty Days as a Result of which She Commits A Forbidden Act

segments: : حدثنا سعد بن عبد الله قال: حدثني يعقوب ابن يزيد، عن محمد بن إبراهيم، عن الحسين بن المختار، باسناده يرفعه إلى سلمان رحمة الله عليه أنه قال في حديث له: من اتخذ جارية فلم يأتها في كل أربعين يوما، ثم أتت محرما كان وزر ذلك عليه
arabic.text: : حدثنا سعد بن عبد الله قال: حدثني يعقوب ابن يزيد، عن محمد بن إبراهيم، عن الحسين بن المختار، باسناده يرفعه إلى سلمان رحمة الله عليه أنه قال في حديث له: من اتخذ جارية فلم يأتها في كل أربعين يوما، ثم أتت محرما كان وزر ذلك عليه

segments: 22-7 (The compiler of the book narrated) that his father - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Sa’ed ibn Abdullah quoted Yaqoob ibn Yazid, on the authority of Muhammad ibn Ibrahim, on the authority of Al-Hussein ibn al-Mukhtar who linked it up through a chain of narrators to Salman - may God have Mercy upon him, “If one takes a female slave and doesn’t have sex with her once every forty days resulting in her committing a forbidden act, he would be held responsible for her sin.”
en.dr-ali-peiravi.text: 22-7 (The compiler of the book narrated) that his father - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Sa’ed ibn Abdullah quoted Yaqoob ibn Yazid, on the authority of Muhammad ibn Ibrahim, on the authority of Al-Hussein ibn al-Mukhtar who linked it up through a chain of narrators to Salman - may God have Mercy upon him, “If one takes a female slave and doesn’t have sex with her once every forty days resulting in her committing a forbidden act, he would be held responsible for her sin.”

narratorChain.raw: 22-7 حدثنا أبي رضي الله عنه قال

titles.en: On One who Takes A Female Slave and Doesn’t Have Sexual Intercourse with Her Once Every Forty Days as a Result of which She Commits A Forbidden Act

segments: : حدثنا محمد بن الحسن الصفار، عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عثمان بن عيسى، عمن ذكره، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: من اتخذ جارية فلم يأتها في كل أربعين يوما كان وزر ذلك عليه
arabic.text: : حدثنا محمد بن الحسن الصفار، عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عثمان بن عيسى، عمن ذكره، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: من اتخذ جارية فلم يأتها في كل أربعين يوما كان وزر ذلك عليه

segments: 22-8 Muhammad ibn al-Hassan ibn Ahmad ibn al-Walid - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Muhammad ibn al-Hassan al-Saffar quoted Yaqoob ibn Yazid, on the authority of Uthman ibn Isa who linked it up through a chain of narrations to Aba Abdullah as-Sadiq (MGB), “If one takes a female slave and doesn’t have sex with her once every forty days, he would be held responsible for her sins.”
en.dr-ali-peiravi.text: 22-8 Muhammad ibn al-Hassan ibn Ahmad ibn al-Walid - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Muhammad ibn al-Hassan al-Saffar quoted Yaqoob ibn Yazid, on the authority of Uthman ibn Isa who linked it up through a chain of narrations to Aba Abdullah as-Sadiq (MGB), “If one takes a female slave and doesn’t have sex with her once every forty days, he would be held responsible for her sins.”

narratorChain.raw: 22-8 حدثنا محمد بن الحسن بن أحمد بن الوليد رضي الله عنه قال

parts.text: محمد بن الحسن بن أحمد بن الوليد رضي الله عنه قال
